TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ingat pila bhgun sraran hga, pila lban/ pila' brbar baqun balay na ssquliq. qutux brbar nanak qu pila. thuyay maziy nniqun, glgan. ru baqun maziy ngasal uzi. te qsu balay hga, si giway p'iyuw qaya qu ssquliq. yan muya cikay guquh na squliq ru bih ngasal nha pmuhi cikah pngran . yasa baq p'iyuw pinbahuw qu lhga. muci qani lga, piyux llamu' nniqun ta kwara la. muci qani ga, ini' 'llaw uzi. m_yan muya piyux balay guquh na squliq. aki nyux mnglung 'myuw qutux hanray ki ppqlcing. ana ga, ini' soya pzyux guquh qu ppqlcing. hrhil qu llungun nya hiya. muci yasa lga, ini' baqi p'iyuw hga hiya lru. nanu yasa s'agal nha qaxa ru king, kong p'iyuw nqu ssquliq. nanu qani pila na qsu wayal. kincipoq balay qu king ru kong. iyat skongat nerang nya. yasa qu galan ta bbiran pila. aki nyux mosa lmosay twahiq ru ini' ga, pbaziy hmit na ngasal. iyat 'llaw hangal pzyux balay na king. nanu yasa kbalay pila lban / pila' brbar nha nanak qu qutux qutux qalang. galan nha pila bbiran na qalang. aki snhyun squliq kwara squ knalay sebu' nqu pila lban/ pila' brbar iyat msbah yan lxan brbar. qsu wayal na sebu' kbalay pila lban/ pila' brbar ga, si ga spngun nha snku squ king . ru kyalun sebu' qu ssquliq. ana knwan baqun mamu 'myuw pila lban qu king. 1971 kawas. krahu mrhuw na Amirika' Niksn kmal mha. kbalay pila Amirika' ana ini' spngi snku na king. iyat yugun pila Amirika' qu king. zyaw qani ini' khotaw snhi na ssquliq squ kbalay pila lban sebu'. nanu yasa snhyun ssquliq qu sebu'. baqun maziy nnanu qaya qu pila. snhyun ssquliq qu sebu' lga, snhyun nha balay qu krahu na ginko uzi. syakay na misuw. iyat ckaw pila lban/ pila' brbar nanak qu ssquliq. baq ckaw snhyun ggalan krryax uzi. snhyun ggalan ga " pila gomu" son nha. krangi' nha pila ckaw. baha hmswa snhyun na ssquliq qu bnrwan nqu ginko .
S.PHON: iŋat pila βħɣun s~ɕraran ħɣa, pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar βaqun βalaj na s~ɕs~ɕquliq. qutux βrβar nanak qu pila. tħujaj mazij nniqun, ɣlɣan. ru βaqun mazij ŋas~ɕal uzi. te qs~ɕu βalaj ħɣa, s~ɕi ɣiwaj pʔijuw qaja qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. jan muja ʦ~ʨikaj ɣuquħ na s~ɕquliq ru βiħ ŋas~ɕal nħa pmuħi ʦ~ʨikaħ pŋran . jas~ɕa βaq pʔijuw pinβaħuw qu lħɣa. muʦ~ʨi qani lɣa, pijux llamuʔ nniqun ta kwara la. muʦ~ʨi qani ɣa, iniʔ ʔllaw uzi. məjan muja pijux βalaj ɣuquħ na s~ɕquliq. aki njux mŋluŋ ʔmjuw qutux ħanraj ki ppqlʦ~ʨiŋ. ana ɣa, iniʔ s~ɕoja pzjux ɣuquħ qu ppqlʦ~ʨiŋ. ħrħil qu lluŋun nja ħija. muʦ~ʨi jas~ɕa lɣa, iniʔ βaqi pʔijuw ħɣa ħija lru. nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕʔaɣal nħa qaxa ru kiŋ, koŋ pʔijuw nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. nanu qani pila na qs~ɕu wajal. kinʦ~ʨipoq βalaj qu kiŋ ru koŋ. ijat s~ɕkoŋat neraŋ nja. jas~ɕa qu ɣalan ta ββiran pila. aki njux mos~ɕa lmos~ɕaj twaħiq ru iniʔ ɣa, pβazij ħmit na ŋas~ɕal. ijat ʔllaw ħaŋal pzjux βalaj na kiŋ. nanu jas~ɕa kβalaj pila lβan / pilaʔ βrβar nħa nanak qu qutux qutux qalaŋ. ɣalan nħa pila ββiran na qalaŋ. aki s~ɕnħjun s~ɕquliq kwara s~ɕqu knalaj s~ɕeβuʔ nqu pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar ijat ms~ɕβaħ jan lxan βrβar. qs~ɕu wajal na s~ɕeβuʔ kβalaj pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar ɣa, s~ɕi ɣa s~ɕpŋun nħa s~ɕnku s~ɕqu kiŋ . ru kjalun s~ɕeβuʔ qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. ana knwan βaqun mamu ʔmjuw pila lβan qu kiŋ. **** kawas~ɕ. kraħu mrħuw na amirikaʔ niks~ɕn kmal mħa. kβalaj pila amirikaʔ ana iniʔ s~ɕpŋi s~ɕnku na kiŋ. ijat juɣun pila amirikaʔ qu kiŋ. zjaw qani iniʔ kħotaw s~ɕnħi na s~ɕs~ɕquliq s~ɕqu kβalaj pila lβan s~ɕeβuʔ. nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕnħjun s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu s~ɕeβuʔ. βaqun mazij nnanu qaja qu pila. s~ɕnħjun s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu s~ɕeβuʔ lɣa, s~ɕnħjun nħa βalaj qu kraħu na ɣinko uzi. s~ɕjakaj na mis~ɕuw. ijat ʦ~ʨkaw pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar nanak qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. βaq ʦ~ʨkaw s~ɕnħjun ɣɣalan krrjax uzi. s~ɕnħjun ɣɣalan ɣa " pila ɣomu" s~ɕon nħa. kraŋiʔ nħa pila ʦ~ʨkaw. βaħa ħms~ɕwa s~ɕnħjun na s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu βnrwan nqu ɣinko .
S.FORM: ingat pila bhgun sraran hga, pila lban/ pila' brbar baqun balay na ssquliq. qutux brbar nanak qu pila. thuyay maziy nniqun, glgan. ru baqun maziy ngasal uzi. te qsu balay hga, si giway p'iyuw qaya qu ssquliq. yan muya cikay guquh na squliq ru bih ngasal nha pmuhi cikah pngran . yasa baq p'iyuw pinbahuw qu lhga. muci qani lga, piyux llamu' nniqun ta kwara la. muci qani ga, ini' 'llaw uzi. m_yan muya piyux balay guquh na squliq. aki nyux mnglung 'myuw qutux hanray ki ppqlcing. ana ga, ini' soya pzyux guquh qu ppqlcing. hrhil qu llungun nya hiya. muci yasa lga, ini' baqi p'iyuw hga hiya lru. nanu yasa s'agal nha qaxa ru king, kong p'iyuw nqu ssquliq. nanu qani pila na qsu wayal. kincipoq balay qu king ru kong. iyat skongat nerang nya. yasa qu galan ta bbiran pila. aki nyux mosa lmosay twahiq ru ini' ga, pbaziy hmit na ngasal. iyat 'llaw hangal pzyux balay na king. nanu yasa kbalay pila lban / pila' brbar nha nanak qu qutux qutux qalang. galan nha pila bbiran na qalang. aki snhyun squliq kwara squ knalay sebu' nqu pila lban/ pila' brbar iyat msbah yan lxan brbar. qsu wayal na sebu' kbalay pila lban/ pila' brbar ga, si ga spngun nha snku squ king . ru kyalun sebu' qu ssquliq. ana knwan baqun mamu 'myuw pila lban qu king. 1971 kawas. krahu mrhuw na Amirika' Niksn kmal mha. kbalay pila Amirika' ana ini' spngi snku na king. iyat yugun pila Amirika' qu king. zyaw qani ini' khotaw snhi na ssquliq squ kbalay pila lban sebu'. nanu yasa snhyun ssquliq qu sebu'. baqun maziy nnanu qaya qu pila. snhyun ssquliq qu sebu' lga, snhyun nha balay qu krahu na ginko uzi. syakay na misuw. iyat ckaw pila lban/ pila' brbar nanak qu ssquliq. baq ckaw snhyun ggalan krryax uzi. snhyun ggalan ga " pila gomu" son nha. krangi' nha pila ckaw. baha hmswa snhyun na ssquliq qu bnrwan nqu ginko .
S.PHON: iŋat pila βħɣun s~ɕraran ħɣa, pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar βaqun βalaj na s~ɕs~ɕquliq. qutux βrβar nanak qu pila. tħujaj mazij nniqun, ɣlɣan. ru βaqun mazij ŋas~ɕal uzi. te qs~ɕu βalaj ħɣa, s~ɕi ɣiwaj pʔijuw qaja qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. jan muja ʦ~ʨikaj ɣuquħ na s~ɕquliq ru βiħ ŋas~ɕal nħa pmuħi ʦ~ʨikaħ pŋran . jas~ɕa βaq pʔijuw pinβaħuw qu lħɣa. muʦ~ʨi qani lɣa, pijux llamuʔ nniqun ta kwara la. muʦ~ʨi qani ɣa, iniʔ ʔllaw uzi. məjan muja pijux βalaj ɣuquħ na s~ɕquliq. aki njux mŋluŋ ʔmjuw qutux ħanraj ki ppqlʦ~ʨiŋ. ana ɣa, iniʔ s~ɕoja pzjux ɣuquħ qu ppqlʦ~ʨiŋ. ħrħil qu lluŋun nja ħija. muʦ~ʨi jas~ɕa lɣa, iniʔ βaqi pʔijuw ħɣa ħija lru. nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕʔaɣal nħa qaxa ru kiŋ, koŋ pʔijuw nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. nanu qani pila na qs~ɕu wajal. kinʦ~ʨipoq βalaj qu kiŋ ru koŋ. ijat s~ɕkoŋat neraŋ nja. jas~ɕa qu ɣalan ta ββiran pila. aki njux mos~ɕa lmos~ɕaj twaħiq ru iniʔ ɣa, pβazij ħmit na ŋas~ɕal. ijat ʔllaw ħaŋal pzjux βalaj na kiŋ. nanu jas~ɕa kβalaj pila lβan / pilaʔ βrβar nħa nanak qu qutux qutux qalaŋ. ɣalan nħa pila ββiran na qalaŋ. aki s~ɕnħjun s~ɕquliq kwara s~ɕqu knalaj s~ɕeβuʔ nqu pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar ijat ms~ɕβaħ jan lxan βrβar. qs~ɕu wajal na s~ɕeβuʔ kβalaj pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar ɣa, s~ɕi ɣa s~ɕpŋun nħa s~ɕnku s~ɕqu kiŋ . ru kjalun s~ɕeβuʔ qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. ana knwan βaqun mamu ʔmjuw pila lβan qu kiŋ. **** kawas~ɕ. kraħu mrħuw na amirikaʔ niks~ɕn kmal mħa. kβalaj pila amirikaʔ ana iniʔ s~ɕpŋi s~ɕnku na kiŋ. ijat juɣun pila amirikaʔ qu kiŋ. zjaw qani iniʔ kħotaw s~ɕnħi na s~ɕs~ɕquliq s~ɕqu kβalaj pila lβan s~ɕeβuʔ. nanu jas~ɕa s~ɕnħjun s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu s~ɕeβuʔ. βaqun mazij nnanu qaja qu pila. s~ɕnħjun s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu s~ɕeβuʔ lɣa, s~ɕnħjun nħa βalaj qu kraħu na ɣinko uzi. s~ɕjakaj na mis~ɕuw. ijat ʦ~ʨkaw pila lβan/ pilaʔ βrβar nanak qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq. βaq ʦ~ʨkaw s~ɕnħjun ɣɣalan krrjax uzi. s~ɕnħjun ɣɣalan ɣa " pila ɣomu" s~ɕon nħa. kraŋiʔ nħa pila ʦ~ʨkaw. βaħa ħms~ɕwa s~ɕnħjun na s~ɕs~ɕquliq qu βnrwan nqu ɣinko .
